'''Newoongalls''' were multi-legged [[spider/Legends|arachnoid]] creatures native to [[Rodia/Legends|Rodia]]. The creatures were often spotted with dripping pincers. Able to climb and jump, they clung to [[cave/Legends|cavern]] ceilings and dropped down on unsuspecting prey in surprise attacks.
==History==
During the [[Galactic Civil War]], [[Teeko Soonca]], [[Ruku Kooff]] and [[Mannee Swaano]], with some off-world visitors, encountered a trio of newoongalls while they traversed a cave in order to find their way to their [[hunting lodge]].

==Appearances==
*{{WEGCite|story=A Trip to the Country|book=Shadows of the Empire Planets Guide}}
